title: AC Feasibility Prompts Schema
description: Schema for .claude/metadata/ac-feasibility-prompts.json — externalized LLM-readable prompt block driving the AC verification-mechanism feasibility gate in /add-story, /bug, /enhancement (and, per #2425 follow-up, /create-prd and /create-backlog).

version.description: Schema version of this prompts file. Bump on breaking shape changes.

classify.description: First gate: classify each AC as deliverable vs verification.

verificationGate.description: Second gate: for verification ACs, name the mechanism explicitly and check existing test-harness usage.

triggerPhrases.description: Heuristic phrases that flag an AC for verificationGate evaluation. The list is intentionally non-exhaustive — the load-bearing piece is the gate's prompts, not the trigger list. Add phrases as new aspirational-mechanism patterns emerge.

deliverableSplit.description: Third gate: when an AC bundles deliverable + verification, split into independently judgable ACs.
